title: Sqlitelogictest crash on complex case statement
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value INT, nullable_value INT);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, nullable_value) VALUES (1, 10, NULL), (2, 20, 30), (3, 40, NULL);
SELECT id, CASE WHEN nullable_value IS NULL THEN value ELSE nullable_value END AS result FROM test_table;
SELECT id, (CASE WHEN value > 15 THEN NULLIF(value, 20) ELSE COUNT(*) END) AS computed_value FROM test_table GROUP BY id;

SELECT + 62 * + - ( CASE WHEN NULL NOT IN ( CAST ( - 77 AS SIGNED ) ) THEN NULL WHEN ( NULL ) NOT IN ( 94 * COUNT ( * ) ) THEN + ( NULLIF ( 45, 80 + 90 ) ) - COUNT ( * ) ELSE NULL END ) AS col2 FROM test_table;
key_bug_features: Crash on complex case statement with NULL handling
